00027 #ifndef JELATINE_JAVA_LANG_THREAD_H
00028 #   define JELATINE_JAVA_LANG_THREAD_H (1)
00029 
00030 #include "wrappers.h"
00031 
00032 #include "header.h"
00033 
00036 struct java_lang_Thread_t {
00037     uintptr_t name; 
00038     uintptr_t runnable; 
00039     header_t header; 
00040     uintptr_t vmThread; 
00041 #if (SIZEOF_VOID_P == 2)
00042     uint16_t padding; 
00043 #endif
00044     int32_t priority; 
00045 };
00046 
00048 typedef struct java_lang_Thread_t java_lang_Thread_t;
00049 
00051 #define JAVA_LANG_THREAD_REF_N (2)
00052 
00054 #define JAVA_LANG_THREAD_NREF_SIZE \
00055         (sizeof(java_lang_Thread_t) - offsetof(java_lang_Thread_t, vmThread))
00056 
00058 #define JAVA_LANG_THREAD_REF2PTR(r) \
00059         ((java_lang_Thread_t *) ((r) - offsetof(java_lang_Thread_t, header)))
00060 
00062 #define JAVA_LANG_THREAD_PTR2REF(p) \
00063         ((uintptr_t) (p) + offsetof(java_lang_Thread_t, header))
00064 
00065 #endif // !JELATINE_JAVA_LANG_THREAD_H
